title: plagiogyria articulata
intro: Plagiogyria articulata, also known as Japanese chain fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. The plant is often prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. Additionally, the plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems.
